rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Health & Safety Code §301.031, which defines terms for cooperative associations serving health-related institutions. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: "Eligible institution" means an entity engaged in health-related pursuits that, except for cooperative associations, is exempt from federal income tax
_note: Rule text concerns definitions for health-related cooperative associations; no nexus to homestead exemption amounts.
